summary: Auto-Resolver Feature Testing Complete. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Auto-Resolver section displays correctly with status, interval, runs, pending counts. Forecast Quality tab shows 10 resolved forecasts (9 auto-resolved + 1 previous), improved MAE of 1.7F (from 4.3F), error distribution histogram with multiple colored bars, and station metrics table with all 5 stations (KATL, KDFW, KLGA, KMIA, KORD).

minor.issue: Total runs/resolved reset to 0 after server hot-reload. This is expected behavior as in-memory counters reset, but may be confusing to users.

backend_api_tests: Health response has all 12 required fields
Manual trigger response has correct format {resolved, pending, skipped, errors}
Manual trigger is idempotent (safe to repeat)
No pending records returns resolved=0 pending=0
forecast_quality has 5 stations: KATL, KDFW, KLGA, KMIA, KORD
error_distribution has multiple bins (was just 1 before)
Each station has required metric fields
frontend_ui_tests: Global Analytics page loads with data-testid='global-analytics-page'
4 tabs present: Performance, Forecast Quality, Liquidity, Charts
Forecast Quality tab stat cards visible: Global MAE=1.7F, Global Bias=-0.1F, Total Forecasts=30, Resolved=10, Pending=20
Auto-Resolver section visible with Status=Running, Interval=6h, Total Runs=0, Total Resolved=0, Pending Records=0
Error Distribution histogram visible with multiple colored bars (green/yellow)
Station Forecast Metrics table visible with 5 rows
All 5 stations visible in table: KATL, KDFW, KLGA, KMIA, KORD

critical_code_review_comments: AutoResolverService correctly uses Open-Meteo Archive API to fetch observed temperatures
Service properly handles rate limiting between station API calls (0.5s delay)
Health endpoint properly exposes all observability metrics
Frontend ForecastTab correctly receives resolver prop and displays all metrics with appropriate data-testid attributes
Error distribution histogram uses color-coding (green/yellow/red) for different error ranges

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements visible, Auto-Resolver section displays correctly, station metrics table has 5 stations)

test_credentials: None required - uses public Open-Meteo Archive API
seed_data_creation: None - uses existing 30 forecast records with 10 now resolved across 5 stations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-resolver feature fully tested. Service at /app/backend/services/auto_resolver_service.py runs as background job (default 6h interval, first pass 30s after startup). GET /api/health/auto-resolver returns health object. POST /api/auto-resolver/run manually triggers resolution pass. Weather health at /api/strategies/weather/health now includes auto_resolver. Global analytics at /api/analytics/global includes auto_resolver health and updated forecast_quality with 10 resolved forecasts, 5 stations, and improved MAE of 1.7F. Frontend GlobalAnalytics.jsx ForecastTab displays Auto-Resolver section with all metrics.

features_tested.auto_resolver_health_endpoint: PASS - Returns complete health object with all metrics
features_tested.auto_resolver_manual_trigger: PASS - POST returns {resolved, pending, skipped, errors}
features_tested.forecast_quality_five_stations: PASS - KATL, KDFW, KLGA, KMIA, KORD all present
features_tested.regression_existing_pages: PASS - Overview, Weather, Markets load correctly
